name: Italian Meat Loaf Patties
recipeIngredient: 1 Can Del Monte Italian or Sloppy Joe Sauce
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 375°F.
In an 8-quart pot, cook noodles according to directions; drain (Rinse half of the noodles in cold water and cover; refrigerate for Layered Noodle Bake). Toss remaining noodles in butter; keep hot.
Set aside half of the sauce to brush on patties. In a large bowl, combine remaining sauce with ground beef, bread crumbs, eggs, dried onions, and melted butter; mix with fork.
On a large, greased baking sheet, shape meat mixture into (1-inch thick) oblong patties. Brush reserved sauce on patties.
Bake 20 minutes or until no longer pink in the center. Cool; cover and refrigerate half of the cooked patties for Layered Noodle Bake. Serve remaining patties with hot, buttered noodles.
Note: When shaped into patties, they bake in half the time.
